rationale: The query's transferable engine is a linear-stability/Turing analysis of a reaction-diffusion (activator-inhibitor) system on a network, decomposing perturbations onto graph-Laplacian eigenmodes to derive a discrete dispersion relation and degree-dependent differentiation threshold, exactly as re-expressed in hyp_abstract for lake phosphorus-oxygen dynamics. The candidate instead describes a local acquaintance-immunization heuristic (pick a random node, immunize a higher-degree neighbor) for epidemic control, with no reaction-diffusion equations, no stability/eigenmode analysis, and no dispersion or threshold law derived from Laplacian spectra — only incidental shared vocabulary like "network," "degree," and "nodes," so method_coherence is false. The object also differs: the query concerns spontaneous activator/inhibitor differentiation of network nodes (morphogenesis/ecology), whereas the candidate concerns vaccination allocation to curb epidemic spread on social/scale-free networks — a genuinely different phenomenon and field, so object_difference is true.
